strengths: 15+ years of polyglot engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems
Founder of GISCollective and active community educator (workshops, talks, courses)
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
concerns: No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in an AI-related field
Limited demonstrated AI/ML product leadership or recognized AI expertise
Career trajectory is senior IC, not director-level/principal scope with strategic customer advisory experience

key_factors.factor: Depth of AI/ML expertise and shipped AI products
Breadth of engineering experience and polyglot fluency
Director-level IC scope and strategic advisory track record

response.justification: The candidate brings deep, broad software craftsmanship across many stacks and a founder mindset via GISCollective, with recent hands-on work in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling. However, the role targets a Principal/Director-level IC with recognized AI expertise, shipped AI platforms, and strategic customer advisory experience — areas where the resume shows emerging rather than established credentials, and no advanced AI degree.
